description:
Turn your voice into polished text.

Ultra-fast AI powered dictation that understands what you want to say and how you want to say it. Instantly turn speech into perfect emails, crisp notes, clear messages, professional communication, and more.
Features and Fixes
- Modes UI overhaul
- Activation Apps UI and indexing overhaul
- Clickable timestamps in History segment view
- Model favorites UI
- Multiple crash fixes
- Fix custom Anthropic model creation flow
- Fix crash on drag recording window between monitors
